generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUst10LxLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUst10LxLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iDepthCameraFeedDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCameraFeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera feed data for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iDepthCameraFeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for real-time speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor for steering direction measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from LiDAR and depth camera processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ThreeDVisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks, vehicle state (speed, steering angle), and processed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter for point cloud processing and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model compliant with ISO 15622 Performance Class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, ACCEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler, ThreeDVisualizationEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and development"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for ROS2 node scripting and development"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseManagement : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database management system for persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for point cloud clustering and tracking implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for ACC control implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for real-time data monitoring and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for remote management of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for 3D environmental rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path; report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualization, VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, TroubleshootingReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin to reduce on-board ECU load"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffloading
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracking and environmental rendering"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalRendering, ObjectTrackingVisualization
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks from sensor data"
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path visualization based on ACC calculations"
]

instance TroubleshootingReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report for troubleshooting and performance analysis"
]

instance ACCComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computation to Digital Twin to reduce on-board ECU load"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnvironmentalRendering : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D environmental rendering based on object tracking"
]

instance ObjectTrackingVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracking in 3D environment"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed regulation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity on cloud/server"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity on remote machine"
]

instance CrossSystemDataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Data Translation Functional Entity for inter-entity communication"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for physical twin entity"
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for upper-level chassis processing"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Retrofitted : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
]

instance VehicleSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemDataTranslationFE, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor, JetsonOrinNano, JetsonNX, TraxxasSlash4x4Retrofitted
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking signals) and steering adjustments generated by the Controlling FE and Actuation FE, transmitted over Wi-Fi to the Physical Twin Entity for motor voltage conversion and servo control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185 V2V requirements) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for distributed system coordination, ensuring real-time operation for safety-critical ACC functions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based orchestration with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Collection, Reporting), User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity data flow with serialization and unit conversion."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation, compliance validation) and operation phase (optimization, health monitoring), covering 'as designed' (ACC logic per ISO 15622) and 'as operated' (real-time vehicle state tracking) representation phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 Performance Class I (no road curvature); latency and clock sync requirements (100 ms) constrained by hardware limitations; no explicit verification/validation mechanisms detailed beyond compliance with standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (vehicle); Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) on cloud/server; User Entity on remote machine; Data Storage external to vehicle per requirement R3."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT design; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requiring ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization for real-time operation; no specific cybersecurity protocols detailed in document."
]
